query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A young boy in a white t-shirt, white shorts, and white sneakers captured mid-stride running across a grassy field with trees and blurred background figures visible behind him.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young boy in a white t-shirt, white shorts, and white sneakers captured mid-stride running across a grassy field, rendered with heavy motion blur that streaks the background into horizontal bands of green and brown while softening his limbs into indistinct smears, creating a sense of rapid speed and kinetic energy at the cost of sharp detail.
